## Summary

Describe the change in plain language.

## Why This Change

Explain the problem, risk, or user need this PR addresses.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run production-readiness`

## Risk Notes

Call out any effect on:
- auth or permissions
- share / alias / ticket delivery behavior
- malware or moderation paths
- env vars or operations
- public trust surfaces / docs
